tasks.title: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to understand ClaudeCode's features and capabilities. Document your findings including key functionalities, strengths, and potential gaps compared to our product. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/claudecode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze Copilot-CLI Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze copilot-cli competitor product. Document its features, capabilities, strengths, and weaknesses compared to our product. Focus on unique features we might be missing. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/copilotcli_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../opencode to understand OpenCode's features and implementation approach. Document key functionalities, innovative aspects, and areas where it outperforms our solution. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/opencode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze RooCode Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze roocode competitor product. Identify its core features, user experience elements, and technical implementations that differentiate it from our product. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/roocode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Product Feature Review
tasks.description: Conduct comprehensive review of our current product features and capabilities. Document existing functionality, user workflows, and current limitations. This will serve as baseline for comparison with competitors. Save to target/temp/swarmout/product_review.md

tasks.title: Synthesize Competitor Analysis and Generate Feature Recommendations
tasks.description: Consolidate all competitor analysis documents and product review to identify missing features in our product. Create a prioritized list of feature additions we should implement based on competitive gaps and market opportunities.

tasks.title: Create Implementation Plan with Milestones
tasks.description: Using the recommended features from s6, create a detailed implementation plan document in target/temp/swarmout/SWARMOUT2.md. Include: 1) Executive summary of recommendations, 2) Detailed feature descriptions, 3) Implementation milestones with timelines, 4) Specific tasks for each milestone, 5) Resource requirements. Structure the document professionally with clear sections.
